title: Looking for Canva Social Media Designer
brief: I am looking for a Canva graphic designer that can design 10–15 editable Canva templates, 3 carousel styles, 2 reel cover styles, a typography system, icon set, sticker pack, post variations, color palette, and a complete social launch kit. I already have the logo and brand identity. I require a few pre-launch templates and afterward want to be able to continuously remix, reuse, and adapt the assets for future campaigns without starting from scratch. Please note that part of the brand identity is colorful pop art which will be the main drive behind • pop-art social media kit required • reusable templates • launch campaign assets
